summary.lv: LLM/GenAI inženieris Accenture komandā strādā Fortune 500 klientu projektos — projektē, izstrādā un izvieto prototipus un produkcijas līmeņa LLM risinājumus, pārvalda CI/CD un MLOps konveijerus, sniedz tehnisku padomu klientiem. Sagaidām 3+ gadu Python pieredzi, hands-on LLM API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Azure OpenAI) un RAG arhitektūras zināšanas.
summary.en: LLM/GenAI engineer at Accenture working with Fortune 500 clients to prototype, build, deploy and operate production LLM solutions, owning CI/CD and MLOps pipelines and advising clients on LLM adoption. Requires 3+ years Python, hands-on LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Azure OpenAI), and strong RAG and vector database experience.
